Package noppes.npcs.api.ability

Interface IPlayerAbilityData

  • public interface IPlayerAbilityData
    Interface for managing player abilities. Players reference abilities by key (built-in names or custom UUIDs).

    Access via IPlayerData.getAbilityData()

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean activateAbility()
      Activate the currently selected ability.
      boolean activateAbility​(String key)
      Activate a specific ability by key.
      void completeCurrentAbility()
      Signal the current ability to complete immediately.
      IAbility getCurrentAbility()
      Get the currently executing ability.
      String getSelectedAbilityKey()
      Get the key of the currently selected ability.
      int getSelectedIndex()
      Get the currently selected ability index.
      int getToggleState​(String key)
      Get the current toggle state for an ability.
      String[] getUnlockedAbilities()
      Get all unlocked ability keys.
      boolean hasUnlockedAbility​(String key)
      Check if the player has unlocked a specific ability.
      void interruptCurrentAbility()
      Interrupt the currently executing ability.
      boolean isAbilityToggled​(String key)
      Check if a toggle ability is currently active (any state > 0).
      boolean isExecutingAbility()
      Check if the player is currently executing an ability.
      boolean isOnCooldown()
      Check if the player is on universal cooldown.
      boolean isOnCooldown​(String key)
      Check if a specific ability is on cooldown.
      void lockAbility​(String key)
      Lock (remove) an ability from this player.
      void resetAllCooldowns()
      Reset all cooldowns.
      void resetCooldown()
      Reset the universal cooldown.
      void resetCooldown​(String key)
      Reset cooldown for a specific ability key.
      void selectNext()
      Select the next ability in the list.
      void selectPrevious()
      Select the previous ability in the list.
      void setSelectedIndex​(int index)
      Set the selected ability index.
      void setToggleState​(String key, int state)
      Set a toggle to a specific state.
      int toggleAbility​(String key)
      Cycle a toggle ability to its next state.
      void unlockAbility​(String key)
      Unlock an ability for this player.

    • Method Detail

      • getUnlockedAbilities

        String[] getUnlockedAbilities()
        Get all unlocked ability keys.
        Returns:
        array of ability keys

      • unlockAbility

        void unlockAbility​(String key)
        Unlock an ability for this player.
        Parameters:
        key - The ability key (built-in name or custom UUID)

      • lockAbility

        void lockAbility​(String key)
        Lock (remove) an ability from this player.
        Parameters:
        key - the ability key

      • hasUnlockedAbility

        boolean hasUnlockedAbility​(String key)
        Check if the player has unlocked a specific ability.
        Parameters:
        key - the ability key
        Returns:
        true if unlocked

      • getSelectedIndex

        int getSelectedIndex()
        Get the currently selected ability index.
        Returns:
        the selected index

      • setSelectedIndex

        void setSelectedIndex​(int index)
        Set the selected ability index.
        Parameters:
        index - the ability index

      • getSelectedAbilityKey

        String getSelectedAbilityKey()
        Get the key of the currently selected ability.
        Returns:
        the selected ability key

      • selectNext

        void selectNext()
        Select the next ability in the list.

      • selectPrevious

        void selectPrevious()
        Select the previous ability in the list.

      • isExecutingAbility

        boolean isExecutingAbility()
        Check if the player is currently executing an ability.
        Returns:
        true if executing

      • getCurrentAbility

        IAbility getCurrentAbility()
        Get the currently executing ability.
        Returns:
        the current ability, or null

      • interruptCurrentAbility

        void interruptCurrentAbility()
        Interrupt the currently executing ability.

      • completeCurrentAbility

        void completeCurrentAbility()
        Signal the current ability to complete immediately.

      • isOnCooldown

        boolean isOnCooldown()
        Check if the player is on universal cooldown.
        Returns:
        true if on cooldown

      • isOnCooldown

        boolean isOnCooldown​(String key)
        Check if a specific ability is on cooldown.
        Parameters:
        key - The ability key
        Returns:
        true if on cooldown

      • resetCooldown

        void resetCooldown()
        Reset the universal cooldown.

      • resetCooldown

        void resetCooldown​(String key)
        Reset cooldown for a specific ability key.
        Parameters:
        key - The ability key

      • resetAllCooldowns

        void resetAllCooldowns()
        Reset all cooldowns.

      • activateAbility

        boolean activateAbility()
        Activate the currently selected ability.
        Returns:
        true if activated

      • activateAbility

        boolean activateAbility​(String key)
        Activate a specific ability by key.
        Parameters:
        key - the ability key
        Returns:
        true if activated

      • toggleAbility

        int toggleAbility​(String key)
        Cycle a toggle ability to its next state. Off -> State 1 -> State 2 -> ... -> State N -> Off
        Parameters:
        key - the ability key
        Returns:
        The new state (0 = off, 1+ = active state number)

      • getToggleState

        int getToggleState​(String key)
        Get the current toggle state for an ability.
        Parameters:
        key - the ability key
        Returns:
        0 if not active, 1+ for active state

      • setToggleState

        void setToggleState​(String key,
                    int state)
        Set a toggle to a specific state. 0 = deactivate, 1+ = specific state.
        Parameters:
        key - the ability key
        state - the toggle state

      • isAbilityToggled

        boolean isAbilityToggled​(String key)
        Check if a toggle ability is currently active (any state > 0).
        Parameters:
        key - the ability key
        Returns:
        true if toggled on
